title: 多义词家族神经元交并比与切换轴统一协议

per_case.sentence: I ate an apple after lunch.
The apple tasted sweet and crisp.
She sliced the apple into thin pieces.
A red apple rolled off the table.
Apple released a new laptop this year.
Many developers build apps for Apple devices.
Apple announced a faster chip for its computers.
Investors watched Apple after the earnings call.

The Amazon flows through a vast rainforest.
Scientists studied fish in the Amazon during the expedition.
Heavy rain caused the Amazon to rise quickly.
Boats moved slowly along the Amazon at sunset.
Amazon opened another logistics center this year.
Many shoppers ordered electronics from Amazon last week.
Amazon reported strong cloud revenue this quarter.
Investors reacted after Amazon released earnings guidance.

The python coiled around the branch.
A large python moved slowly across the ground.
The zoo keeper fed the python in the reptile house.
The python hid beneath the warm rock.
Python made the data analysis script easier to write.
Many beginners learn Python before studying larger systems.
The team used Python to automate daily reports.
Python libraries helped the researchers train the model.

He drank hot java before the meeting.
Fresh java filled the kitchen with a rich smell.
She ordered a cup of java after dinner.
The cafe served strong java all morning.

The service was rewritten in Java for the new release.
Many backend teams still rely on Java in production.
The course teaches Java before advanced compiler topics.

cross_model_summary.core_answer: Across a family of polysemous nouns, ordinary noun context variation keeps a much larger neuron-set overlap, while true polysemy uses a lower-overlap split plus a causal switch axis.
